mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_model_config (user_id, agent_id, base_url, api_key, model) VALUES (#{userId}, #{agentId}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{model}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE base_url = VALUES(base_url), api_key = VALUES(api_key), model = VALUES(model)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, agent_id, base_url, api_key, model, updated_at FROM agent_model_config
